text: UNIFIL PEACEKEEPER KILLED + HOUTHI 2ND WAVE: Indonesian UNIFIL peacekeeper killed, one critically injured at Adchit Al-Qusayr post in south Lebanon (origin unknown, investigation launched); Houthi 2nd wave — 2 drones from Yemen intercepted by IDF at 1:28 AM Israel time; Lebanese health toll: 1,238 killed (49 on Sunday alone); Lebanese paramedic killed in ambulance strike near Bint Jbeil

text: TRUMP: DEAL 'COULD BE SOON' + KHARG ISLAND THREAT: Trump aboard Air Force One says Iran agreed to 'most of' 15 US demands — 'I do see a deal in Iran, yeah. Could be soon'; also tells FT he's considering seizing Kharg Island (Iran's main oil hub, 90% of exports); Iran's Araghchi: 'unreasonable demands'; Ghalibaf: 'waiting to set American soldiers on fire'; Islamabad summit concludes — Pakistan ready to host Rubio-Araghchi talks within days

text: TABRIZ PETROCHEMICAL HIT + MEHRABAD AIRPORT RE-STRUCK: US-Israeli strike hits Tabriz Petrochemical Company at midnight Tehran time — CEO confirms live on state TV, fire contained, no toxic leak; Mehrabad Airport also struck again; Iran Red Crescent condemns civilian aviation targeting; Brent crude surges to $114.90/bbl; IDF executing 3-week campaign against Tehran weapons infrastructure

sources.name: Anadolu Agency — Iran's Tabriz petrochemical facility hit, fire contained

text: DAY 31: IDF 120+ BOMBS TEHRAN + HAIFA REFINERY FIRE: IDF drops 120+ bombs on Tehran missile R&D sites and weapons production — power blackouts in 4 districts, 2 killed near Shaft, 17 wounded; Iran/Hezbollah barrage ignites Bazan Oil Refinery fire in Haifa (7th wave of night) — gasoline tank damaged, Bazan shares -2.5%; Indian worker killed in Iranian drone attack on Kuwait power/desalination plant (8 Indian nationals killed in conflict total)

text: TRUMP 'REGIME CHANGE ACHIEVED' + TAKE THE OIL: Trump (FT interview published March 30): 'We've had regime change — they're all dead'; simultaneously posts on Truth Social he's in 'serious discussions with A NEW, MORE REASONABLE REGIME'; threatens to seize Kharg Island (90% of Iran's oil exports) and 'obliterate' Iran's power plants/oil wells; Iran denies any US deal accepted — Araghchi: 'unreasonable demands'

text: SPAIN BANS US MILITARY FLIGHTS — TRUMP THREATENS TRADE WAR WITH NATO ALLY: Spain formally closes airspace to all US planes in Iran war — first NATO ally to do so; Defense Min. Robles: 'Neither bases nor Spanish airspace authorised for any Iran war actions'; US already relocated 15 aircraft from Rota/Morón; Trump: 'told Scott [Bessent] to cut off all dealings with Spain — they're terrible'; HRW confirms Iran used cluster munitions on Israel; gas at $3.98/gal (+$1 in 31 days)

sources.name: Euronews — Spain closes its airspace to all US aircraft involved in Iran war

text: HRW: IRAN CLUSTER MUNITIONS 'MAY AMOUNT TO WAR CRIMES' + 3 UNIFIL PEACEKEEPERS KILLED: HRW confirms Iran fired cluster-munition ballistic missiles at Israel 3+ times since Feb 28 — 4 Israeli civilians killed; France calls emergency UN Security Council session after 3 UNIFIL peacekeepers killed in two separate incidents in southern Lebanon (1 Indonesian at Adchit Al-Qusayr + 2 in vehicle near Bani Hayyan); Guterres: 'may amount to war crimes'; deadliest single day for UN peacekeepers

BEN ZION KILLED: Rubio tells Al Jazeera US will force Hormuz open if Iran doesn't agree; describes 'fractures in Islamic Republic,' people inside Iran now 'talking to us in ways previous leaders never did'; IDF Sgt. Liran Ben Zion (19, Holon) killed by Hezbollah anti-tank missile in south Lebanon — 7th IDF soldier killed in Lebanon; Israel shifts to economic targets in Iran, IDF 'days from completing all priority targets'

text: DAY 31 PM: US SPECIAL OPS DEPLOYED + OIL SETTLES $112.78 + USS TRIPOLI ARRIVES: Hundreds of Army Rangers and Navy SEALs arrived in Middle East — no mission yet assigned; USS Tripoli (3,500 Marines, F-35Bs) confirmed operational in region; US troops now exceed 57,000 in theater (largest buildup since 2003); Brent crude settles at $112.78/bbl (+41.3% from pre-war); AAA gas $3.99/gal nationally; Iran threatens residences of US/Israeli officials as 'legitimate targets'
